toolbar.exportXlsxTitle: Download the user list as an Excel file
toolbar.importXlsxTitle: Upload an Excel file to create/update multiple users — key: email

bulkReset.title: Send the access email?
bulkReset.message_one: The access email will be sent to {{count}} user (an invitation for those who haven't set a password yet, a reset for the others). Use this to give freshly-created users their first access too.
bulkReset.message_other: The access email will be sent to {{count}} users (an invitation for those who haven't set a password yet, a reset for the others). Use this to give freshly-created users their first access too.

bulkShift.title: Assign schedule in bulk
bulkShift.message_one: The chosen schedule will be assigned to {{count}} user, replacing their current one.
bulkShift.message_other: The chosen schedule will be assigned to {{count}} users, replacing their current one.

bulkModes.title: Stamping methods in bulk
bulkModes.message_one: The chosen methods will replace the current ones for {{count}} user.
bulkModes.message_other: The chosen methods will replace the current ones for {{count}} users.
bulkModes.noneSelected: No method selected: the users won't be able to stamp.

bulkApprovers.title: {{suffix}} approvers in bulk
bulkApprovers.message_one: The chosen approvers will replace the current ones for {{count}} user.
bulkApprovers.message_other: The chosen approvers will replace the current ones for {{count}} users.

confirmDeactivate.title: Deactivate user?
confirmDeactivate.messagePost: will no longer be able to sign in until reactivated. The seat stays occupied — to free it, delete the user.

confirmDelete.title: Delete user?
confirmDelete.messagePost: will be removed from the company and the seat will be freed. Past stamps are retained as required by law. This action cannot be undone — to bring them back you'll have to invite them again.

approver.leaveExplainer: Only the selected users can approve this employee's holiday/leave. If none are configured, admins can decide. Whoever decides first wins.
approver.correctionExplainer: Only the selected users can approve this employee's stamp correction requests. If none are configured, admins can decide. Whoever decides first wins.
approver.title: {{suffix}} approvers for {{name}}

shift.title: Schedule for {{name}}
shift.label: Schedule
shift.validFromHint: The previous assignment will be closed the day before this date.

userEditor.title: Edit user
userEditor.anagraficaHint: Payroll data (Centro Paghe). Must match the employee record in payroll.

tips.externalId: Optional unique employee identifier (e.g. badge or internal code). You manage it: make sure it is unique within the company.
tips.codiceFiscale: 16 characters. Must match the tax code registered in Centro Paghe. Also used to match uploaded documents.
tips.matricola: Employee payroll number (max 4 digits), as in Centro Paghe.
tips.inail: INAIL territorial insurance position code (1 character).
tips.qualifica: Employee's contractual qualification code (1 character), as in Centro Paghe.
tips.qualifica2: Second qualification code, only if required by the contract (1 character).

bulk.messageAdded_one: The selected branches will be added to {{count}} user. Existing assignments stay unchanged.
bulk.messageAdded_other: The selected branches will be added to {{count}} users. Existing assignments stay unchanged.
bulk.messageRemoved_one: The selected branches will be removed from {{count}} user. Other assignments stay unchanged.
bulk.messageRemoved_other: The selected branches will be removed from {{count}} users. Other assignments stay unchanged.

modes.title: Stamping methods for {{name}}
modes.explainer: Choose which methods the user can stamp with. No method selected = the user cannot stamp.
modes.gpsDesc: — from the mobile app, at the branch (geofence)
modes.remoteDesc: — from the web, without location check
modes.noneSelected: No method selected: the user won't be able to stamp.

branchEditor.title: Branches for {{email}}
branchEditor.explainer: Without at least one branch the user won't be able to stamp from the app or the web.
branchEditor.empty: No branch created. Go to "Branches" to create one first.

invite.title: Invite user
invite.subtitle: By default the user immediately receives the access email (an invitation if they haven't set a password yet). Uncheck to create them without an email and send it later (key icon or bulk action).
invite.createdNoEmail: User created. No email sent: use "Send access email" (key icon) to give them their first access.
invite.createdEmailSent: User created. Access email sent: they can sign in right away.
invite.createdMembership: User added. They already had an account: we emailed them to say they were added to the company (they sign in with their existing password).
invite.sendResetEmailHint: Recommended: the user gets an invitation to set a password and can sign in right away. If you uncheck it, send it later from the table (key icon).
invite.isDocumentaleHint: Can upload documents and view all employees' documents (with code verification).
invite.languageHint: Language of emails (password reset, notifications) sent to the user.
invite.noBranches: No branch created. Without branches the user won't be able to stamp.
invite.branchesHint: You can assign more branches after the invite too.

cantieriRole.label: Work sites role
cantieriRole.hint: User: logs work-site activities from the app. Admin: manages sites, vehicles and reports from the web. Independent of the company role.

grid.selfRoleTitle: You can't change your own account's role
grid.modesTitle: Choose which methods the user can stamp with
grid.leaveApproversTitle: Configure who can approve this user's holiday/leave
grid.correctionApproversTitle: Configure who can approve this user's correction requests

actions.cannotDeactivateSelf: You can't deactivate your own account
actions.cannotDeleteSelf: You can't delete your own account
